sections.section_purpose: To provide detailed pricing information as required by the tender.
sections.response_guidance: Complete the pricing schedule as specified in the tender. Reference annexes where required.

sections.section_purpose: To confirm acceptance or propose deviations from the draft contract terms.
sections.response_guidance: State acceptance of, or proposed deviations from, the draft contract terms.

sections.section_purpose: To outline the project management methodology and governance structure.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the project management methodology, governance structure, and reporting approach.

sections.section_purpose: To describe the approach to transitioning services in and out.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the approach to transition-in and, if applicable, transition-out.

sections.section_purpose: To ensure the security framework and controls meet the engagement requirements.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the security framework, controls, and certifications relevant to this engagement.

sections.section_purpose: To identify key personnel involved in the project.
sections.response_guidance: List proposed key personnel with roles, qualifications, and relevant experience.

headings_to_add.heading: Submission Requirements
headings_to_add.section_purpose: To ensure the quotation is submitted correctly and on time.
headings_to_add.response_guidance: Detail the electronic lodgement process via AusTender and ensure compliance with submission procedures.

headings_to_add.heading: Evaluation Criteria
headings_to_add.section_purpose: To understand the criteria against which the quotation will be evaluated.
headings_to_add.response_guidance: Address how the response meets the evaluation criteria: Methodology, Past Performance, Technical Merit, Pricing, Compliance.

headings_to_add.heading: Compliance and Obligations
headings_to_add.section_purpose: To ensure compliance with AIC obligations based on the work order value.
headings_to_add.response_guidance: Complete and submit the appropriate AIC Schedule or Plan as specified.

headings_to_add.heading: Technical Plans
headings_to_add.section_purpose: To outline the technical plans required for the project.
headings_to_add.response_guidance: Deliver the required plans including AIC Plan, Transition-In Plan, Phase-Out Plan, Supplier Risk Management Plan, Service Management Plan, Disaster Recovery Plan, Test Plan.
